task: binary SRKW-call presence vs absence per window

feature.description: log-mel power spectrogram per-band mean/std/p90 + spectral-shape stats; scipy+numpy, no librosa

data.split: temporal within each pool (first 70% train, last 30% test, 1-window gap)

known_confounds: positives (in-bout) and negatives (pre-bout) are different times of the same session; the model may exploit session-level acoustic differences, not call morphology alone
bout-level labels: in-bout windows include non-vocal gaps mislabeled positive; reported metrics are an upper bound on per-call detection
single hydrophone, single bout; cross-station / cross-day generalization NOT evaluated here
honesty.to_strengthen: align Pod.Cast / OrcaHello / DCLDE-2027 per-annotation windows for window-level labels, call-type, and single-vs-multiple heads (STOP-to-O0: corpora fetch + alignment)
